title: buxus sempervirens f. glauca
intro: Buxus sempervirens f. glauca, also known as the golden boxwood or blue box, is a variegated form of the English box plant (Buxus sempervirens). This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Buxus sempervirens f. glauca include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
